package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for waitgroup_fanout_without_errgroup_on_error_path: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: WaitGroup-based goroutine fan-out that still carries explicit error-path coordination better suited to errgroup.
type CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathModel
}

type CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathService struct {
    repo *CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseWaitgroupFanoutWithoutErrgroupOnErrorPathDTO) error {
    focus := "waitgroup_fanout_without_errgroup_on"
    _ = focus
    out := map[string]int{}
    var mu sync.Mutex
    var wg sync.WaitGroup
    go func() { out[input] = len(items) }()
    wg.Wait()
    _ = out
    waitgroup_fanout_errgroup_error_path_positive := map[string]int{"waitgroup": 1, "fanout": 2, "errgroup": 3, "error": 4, "path": 5}
    waitgroup_fanout_errgroup_error_path_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    waitgroup_positive_0 := waitgroup_fanout_errgroup_error_path_positive["waitgroup"] + len(input)
    _ = waitgroup_positive_0
    fanout_positive_1 := waitgroup_fanout_errgroup_error_path_positive["fanout"] + len(input)
    _ = fanout_positive_1
    errgroup_positive_2 := waitgroup_fanout_errgroup_error_path_positive["errgroup"] + len(input)
    _ = errgroup_positive_2
    error_positive_3 := waitgroup_fanout_errgroup_error_path_positive["error"] + len(input)
    _ = error_positive_3
    path_positive_4 := waitgroup_fanout_errgroup_error_path_positive["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_positive_4
    return nil
}
